name: bookshelf
description: Bring a local, relevance-aware literary quote into the work you name.

interface.shortDescription: Books and contextual quotes for your work
interface.longDescription: Browse 1,117 catalogued books, request a fitting quote with an explicit local intent, or opt in to a quiet ambient quote. Catalog provenance varies by record.
defaultPrompt: Share a fitting book quote for what I am working through.
Give me a literary companion for this debugging session.
